name: mental_health_vendor_patch_silently_kestrel_auto_ben
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Mental Health, the situation tagged internally around mental health vendor patch silently kestrel auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Marco Bennett
agents.identity: I am Marco Bennett, the accountable executive on this bridge in Mental Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Luc Santos
agents.identity: I am Luc Santos, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Mental Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if autonomy advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for beneficence.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Marco Bennett must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Marco Bennett do?
